name: com.duxaeternus.imtoolkit
description: Immediate-mode debug UI on top of UI Toolkit. Call IM.Label / IM.Button / IM.Slider from any Update() — no UXML, no PanelSettings asset, no scene setup. A drop-in replacement for OnGUI/GUILayout overlays.

samples.description: A demo window showing every widget, plus a plain top-left overlay panel.
